summary: The largest legal input has nine decimal digits, so both digit counting and powered-digit accumulation have a fixed maximum that cannot yield a stable scaling verdict.

workload_bound.source_constraint: n is an integer from 1 through 100000000

replacement_checks.evidence: The arithmetic reference performs at most two passes over nine decimal digits.
Authored cases cover one through nine digits, Armstrong values, non-Armstrong values, and the maximum input.
